# The serve command rejects malformed flags before starting.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/mina.db --port not-a-number
stderr 'invalid value "not-a-number" for flag -port'

# The serve command requires an explicit database path.
! exec mina serve
stderr 'serve requires --db'

# Access log redirection and quiet mode are mutually exclusive.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/mina.db --quiet --access-log $WORK/access.log
stderr '--quiet cannot be combined with --access-log'
